title: Chapter 2451: Fighting Owen(2)
content:
Chapter 2451: Fighting Owen(2)

After being provoked by Yuan, Owen’s aura surged, unleashing at least thirty percent of his strength as an Absolute God.

A light smile tugged at Yuan’s lips when Owen continued to underestimate him, which wasn’t surprising, as he’d purposefully allowed himself to be overwhelmed just now.

Without exchanging any more words, Yuan and Owen clashed shortly later.

Owen used both Blood Manipulation and Bone Techniques, a power he’d acquired after absorbing many Bone Demons through the Supreme Immolation Array.

Not wanting to alarm Owen too early, Yuan deliberately restrained himself—matching Owen’s strength just closely enough to appear slightly inferior.

’What the hell is happening?! How is a mere first level False God rivaling me, an Absolute God who has been empowered through the Supreme Immolation Array?!’ Owen cried inwardly, feeling shocked even though his face didn’t show it.

Even though he was still holding back the majority of his strength, it still didn’t make sense.

A False God was so insignificant that even a True God could easily kill one without any effort, much less an Absolute God like Owen, who could kill True Gods with five percent of his true strength.

Yet, Yuan, who was a mere first level False God, was barely keeping up with him.

’No...!’ Owen’s pupils shrank as the realization struck him. ’I’ve been steadily increasing my strength, yet he’s still barely keeping up—as if he’s growing stronger alongside me!’

’This bastard... he’s still mocking me!’

Suddenly, Owen drastically increased his output to seventy percent of his true power.

Owen’s sudden surge in power quickly overwhelmed Yuan, and it became obvious that he could no longer keep up.

"Hahaha! What’s wrong, you damn bastard?!" Owen jeered. "Having trouble matching me?! Matching strength is a privilege reserved for the stronger one—you insignificant ant!"

"I guess this is the limit of my Demonic Awakening... alone." Yuan mumbled after seeing his limit.

After absorbing so much Demon God’s Ordeal, Yuan’s demon form had strengthened significantly even if it didn’t fully ascend—to the point where even he couldn’t tell how strong he’d become with it alone until just now.

Sure enough, Yuan had been relying on nothing but his Demonic Awakening this entire time, and he was able to match Owen using around fifty percent of his strength as an Absolute God.

In other words, Yuan, as a first level False God in his Demonic Awakening and with the Demon Annihilation Sword out, was as strong as an Absolute God demon using half of their strength.

Even though the Demon Annihilation Sword was far away, as long as it was out in the world, Yuan would still receive its effects.

It should also be noted that Owen in his current state was much stronger than Supreme Ruler Grant without his fake Eternal Essence. However, when compared to Supreme Ruler Dena, he was still slightly behind.

The next moment, Yuan activated Absolute Dragon Awakening and True Phoenix Awakening, causing his aura to skyrocket even higher.

"What?!" Owen’s eyes widened in shock after seeing how much stronger Yuan’s presence got out of thin air even though his cultivation remained the same.

However, Yuan wasn’t done and also used Chaotic Essence to further strengthen himself.

"Let’s fight for real this time, shall we?" he said with a calm smile on his face.

They continued their fight the next moment.

Meanwhile, in Death Paradise, Helena and Angela were getting impatient.

"Damn it! What the hell is taking him so long?! Don’t tell me that he ditched us, too?!" Helena cried out loud.

"Let’s not jump to conclusions so quickly," Selena said while shaking her head. "He’d just left, and I doubt he’d abandon his friends."

"T-That’s right! He wouldn’t abandon us—at least not Supreme Ruler Dena!" Lev said in a nervous voice. "After all, I personally watched him risk his life just to meet her."

"Oh? Tell me more about it," Selena said, sounding interested in it.

"Well, I didn’t follow him all the way since it was too dangerous for me, but what happened was..." Lev explained the kind of place the Deprived Crimson Valley was before talking about Supreme Ruler Dena’s condition, what she’d done there, and how Yuan went to meet her despite the danger.

"Are they lovers?" Selena asked with an excited smile on her face.

"Uh... I don’t think so, but I also cannot say for sure, so you’ll have to ask him when he returns."

Time passed quickly, in the blink of an eye, several days had gone by since Yuan was sent to capture Owen.

"How?! How the hell is a False God like you fighting an Absolute God like me?!" Owen roared out loud, sounding irritated and confused at the same time.

He was certain Yuan’s cultivation was only at the first level of False God, and that he wasn’t suppressing it, but that only made things more perplexing.

Yuan wasn’t exactly overwhelming in battle, yet their strengths seemed evenly matched, as neither could kill the other, leaving them locked in a stalemate.

Suddenly, in the middle of their battle, Yuan’s aura suddenly started to change.

"This bastard! He’s having a breakthrough in the middle of our fight?!" Owen cried out loud when he realized that Yuan’s cultivation was slowly soaring to the next level.

After consuming the True Emperor of the Seas’ and the Primal Sovereign of the Seas’ Blood Essence, Yuan had actually accumulated enough energy to enter the next realm. However, he purposefully suppressed it and kept his cultivation at the first level of God Ascension, as he hadn’t encountered a threat that required him to really push his cultivation further.

<You have entered the Second Level of God Ascension!>

Suddenly, Yuan felt a strange sensation, as if he were recovering forgotten memories, except what returned wasn’t memory at all, but his strength.

<Your Soul Strength has drastically increased!>

After entering the Second Level of God Ascension, some of the Soul Strength that Yuan gained during his ascension but lost after exiting it returned to him.

One might expect it to be a little, but in a split second, Yuan’s Soul Strength increased by leaps and bounds, becoming at least a dozen times stronger in an instant.
